Actually, let me correct this with a proper query:

```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT i.i_class AS product_class, COALESCE(SUM(cs.cs_net_profit), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(ss.ss_net_profit), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(ws.ws_net_profit), 0) AS total_net_profit FROM item i LEFT JOIN catalog_sales cs ON i.i_item_sk = cs.cs_item_sk LEFT JOIN store_sales ss ON i.i_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk LEFT JOIN web_sales ws ON i.i_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk GROUP BY i.i_class ORDER BY total_net_profit DESC;",
  "reason": "Joining item dimension to access product class; summing net profit across all sales channels."
}
```
